name: Lab
hints: The lab has a Ju-Ju bag, chemistry tubes, and chemicals. All may be important.
GET BAG - the Ju-Ju bag is essential (Medium Maegen's advice about the tight squeeze). The chemicals can be mixed.
GET BAG (for the crack puzzle), GET TUBES and GET CHEMICALS for mixing potions. MIX CHEMICALS with the pot.
GET BAG (essential for passage through crack in room 8). MIX chemicals in the pot to create a potion. WEST returns to the pot room.
notes: Chemistry lab with the Ju-Ju bag (essential for crack puzzle in room 8), chem tubes, and labeled chemicals. MIX chemicals to create potions. WEST returns to room 7 (cast iron pot room).
